name: b2b-lead-intelligence
title: B2B Lead Intelligence
description: End-to-end B2B lead intelligence: source matching companies from public directories (YC, HN hiring, Crunchbase News), enrich each with contacts / tech stack / decision-makers / buying-intent signals, and rank by ICP fit — all in one run.
seoTitle: B2B Lead Intelligence — ICP-Driven Sourcing, Enrichment & Scoring
seoDescription: Describe your ICP and discover matching B2B leads from public sources (YC, HN hiring, Crunchbase News), enriched with contacts, tech stack, decision-makers, and buying-intent signals — then ranked by 0-100 fit score. Login-free, no LinkedIn / Apollo scraping.
